name: create-ccc-magi
description: Install CCC-MAGI v0.10.2 into a project — generic AI development harness with MAGI 7-position AI team (Core / Verdict / Planner / Programmer / Tester / Reviewer / Archivist), cross-model audit, Simple+Pro onboarding modes (5 vs 16 questions), feature-aware session resume, and conversational two-phase bootstrap (environment check + project deployment). Drop-in for Claude Code / Codex CLI projects on macOS, Linux, or Windows (WSL2 / Git Bash). Run via `npx create-ccc-magi@latest` in your project directory.

scripts.test: echo 'No automated tests yet; smoke-test by running bin.js --dry-run in a temp dir'
